thought.text: Let me scan the tasks directory and build out a larger evaluation dataset!

reasoning_content:
The user wants me to pull instructions from the existing tasks/ directory and expand the evaluation dataset. I should:

1. Scan the tasks/ directory for all available tasks
2. Extract instructions from instruction.md or task.toml files
3. Build a larger dataset
4. Run evaluations, skipping any that have errors

Let me start by exploring what's in the tasks directory and how the instructions are structured.

thinking_blocks.thinking:

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "cd /workspace/project/tb-difficulty-tuner && find tasks -name \"instruction.md\" -o -name \"task.toml\" 2>/dev/null | head -50", "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Find task instruction files in tasks directory"}

summary: Find task instruction files in tasks directory
